tagline: Discover the best Jadibuti from Himalayas

products.name: Gurjo
products.description: Gurjo is a classical Ayurvedic herb traditionally used to support day-to-day immunity, stamina, and recovery. Benefits include immune support, antioxidant protection, and support for metabolic balance.

products.name: Tulsi
products.description: Tulsi, also known as Holy Basil, is known as the queen of herbs in Ayurveda. Benefits include support for respiratory health, stress response, and natural immune defense.

products.name: Amla
products.description: Amla is naturally rich in vitamin C and is a traditional rasayana for overall rejuvenation. Benefits include skin and hair nourishment, antioxidant support, and immune system support.

products.name: Neem
products.description: Neem is valued for cleansing and purification practices in traditional systems. Benefits include skin clarity support, microbial balance support, and scalp care support.

products.name: Aloe Vera
products.description: Aloe Vera is widely used in herbal and cosmetic formulations. Benefits include support for skin hydration, soothing care for irritated skin, and digestive wellness support.

products.name: Kapur
products.description: Kapur (camphor) is traditionally used in aromatic rituals and herbal preparations. Benefits include refreshing aromatic support, respiratory comfort in aroma use, and cleansing support in traditional practices.

products.name: Ashwagandha
products.description: Ashwagandha is a traditional adaptogenic herb used for stress resilience and strength. Benefits include stress management support, healthy sleep support, and energy and stamina support.

products.name: Brahmi
products.description: Brahmi is traditionally used for cognitive clarity and calmness. Benefits include support for memory, concentration, and nervous system relaxation.

products.name: Jatamansi
products.description: Jatamansi is a Himalayan aromatic root known for grounding and calming properties in traditional use. Benefits include emotional balance support, sleep support, and mental relaxation.

products.name: Jatamansi (True)
products.description: Jatamansi (Nardostachys jatamansi) is a classical Himalayan herb used for mind-body calming support. Benefits include support for relaxation, sleep quality, and mental composure.

products.name: Turmeric
products.description: Turmeric is a golden spice known for curcumin and antioxidant compounds. Benefits include anti-inflammatory support, joint comfort support, and digestive wellness support.

products.name: Ginger
products.description: Ginger is a warming root used in both food and wellness traditions. Benefits include digestion support, relief from occasional nausea, and circulatory comfort support.

products.name: Dalchini
products.description: Dalchini (true cinnamon) is a fragrant bark spice used for culinary and wellness purposes. Benefits include antioxidant intake, digestive support, and metabolic wellness support.

products.name: Pipla
products.description: Pipla (long pepper) is used in Ayurveda for respiratory and digestive formulations. Benefits include support for digestion, respiratory comfort, and bioavailability support in blends.

products.name: Lemongrass
products.description: Lemongrass offers a citrus aroma and is used in tea and wellness routines. Benefits include digestive ease, antioxidant support, and calming refreshment.

products.name: Kachur
products.description: Kachur (white turmeric) is a fragrant rhizome used in traditional digestive and wellness formulations. Benefits include digestive comfort support, antioxidant support, and traditional skin-friendly herbal use.

products.name: Chiraito
products.description: Chiraito is a bitter Himalayan herb traditionally used for detox and digestive support. Benefits include liver support, appetite support, and internal cleansing support.

products.name: Kutki
products.description: Kutki is a prized Himalayan herb commonly associated with liver and digestive wellness. Benefits include liver function support, digestive support, and metabolic balance support.

products.name: Yarsagumba
products.description: Yarsagumba (Cordyceps sinensis) is a rare high-altitude Himalayan fungus-herb complex. Benefits traditionally include stamina support, respiratory vitality support, and recovery support.

products.name: Satuwa
products.description: Satuwa (Paris polyphylla) is a Himalayan botanical used in traditional regional practices. Benefits are traditionally associated with wellness support and restorative herbal formulations.

products.name: Panch Aule
products.description: Panch Aule is a high-altitude orchid herb known in traditional mountain herbal knowledge. Benefits are traditionally described for vitality support and restorative tonic preparations.

products.name: Loth Salla
products.description: Loth Salla (Himalayan yew) is a conservation-sensitive Himalayan tree species used in traditional botanical contexts. Benefits are described in traditional literature; sourcing should prioritize legal and sustainable supply.

products.name: Rudraksha
products.description: Rudraksha is traditionally valued in Himalayan spiritual and wellness practices. Benefits are associated with grounding support, calmness, and use in traditional lifestyle routines.
